spec_match.rationale: The lab drives the real text-decoration-skip-ink longhand through none, auto, and all, and pairs it with offset, thickness, and script samples that match the CSS Text Decoration Level 4 contract.

interactive.rationale: Radio controls, range sliders, script buttons, a before/after toggle, live CSS output, and annotation panels all update the rendered text in-page.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature-index blurb promises a full text-decoration playground, script catalog, before/after comparison, and auto-vs-all annotations, all of which are present.

edge_cases.rationale: The page now feature-detects text-decoration-skip-ink: all with CSS.supports and surfaces a clear fallback state when the browser cannot parse the keyword.

references.rationale: A labelled references section now includes the required chromestatus.com/feature/5077600085082112 link and the CSS Text Decoration Level 4 spec.

design_system.rationale: The added UI uses shared CSS variables for text, background, borders, and status accents, and button background overrides continue to pair with explicit text colours.

summary: The previous major missing-reference finding is resolved, and the lab now includes explicit support detection and fallback messaging for unsupported browsers.
